data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the implementation of permission scope enforcement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to permission scope enforcement, but the provided evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how this enforcement is implemented. While the linked use case discusses the need for reliable event-driven execution, it does not provide concrete evidence of the permission checks or enforcement mechanisms in place. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to confirm or deny the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of permission scope enforcement implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define permission scope enforcement mechanism
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the existence and functionality of permission scope enforcement for reading data.
